app.title: Sanjeevani
app.health_overview: Here is your digital health overview.
app.sync_failed: Failed to sync your health records. Please verify your connection.

auth.enter_phone: Enter your phone number to continue
auth.enter_name: Please enter your name to register your digital health account.
auth.credentials_desc: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard

profile.subtitle: Manage your identity details, digital health cards, and preferences.
profile.name: Name
profile.abha_desc: Enter the patient's ABHA Address to fetch their records.
profile.abha_otp_sent: An OTP has been sent to the mobile number registered with
profile.abha_sync_desc: The patient's health records are now synchronized.

clinical.need_specialist: Need to speak with a specialist? Book a consult or contact your local ASHA worker.
clinical.vitals_desc: Vitals captured during consultations will appear here.
clinical.clinical_summary_saved: The clinical summary has been securely saved.
clinical.records_browse_desc: Browse, search, and upload clinical test results or prescriptions.
clinical.search_records_placeholder: Search records by name or facility...
clinical.adjust_search: Try adjusting your search query or filters.
clinical.upload_clinical_desc: Upload clinical records to keep your doctor informed during consultations.
clinical.no_patients_queue: No patients in queue at the moment.
clinical.queue_desc: Manage active patient triage, waiting queues, and launch consultations.
clinical.no_waiting_queue: There are no patients currently waiting in the teleconsultation queue.
clinical.care_programs_desc: Manage your active village health programs and community support.
clinical.camp_desc: Free doctor consultations, vital checks, and medicine distribution.
clinical.program_hypertension_desc: Weekly BP monitoring by ASHA and automated refill alerts.
clinical.program_diabetes_desc: Monthly blood glucose screenings and lifestyle coaching.
clinical.booking_failed: Failed to book appointment. Try again.
clinical.prescriptions_desc: Issue digital prescriptions and check pharmacy logs.
clinical.consent_agree: By checking the box below, you (the patient or authorized guardian) agree to the following:
clinical.consent_item1: I consent to the storage and processing of my Personal Health Information (PHI) by this telemedicine platform.
clinical.consent_item2: I allow authorized clinicians and staff to view my clinical history to provide medical care.
clinical.consent_item3: I understand that this data will be stored securely and may be synced with the national ABDM network if linked.
clinical.consent_item4: I reserve the right to revoke this consent at any time by speaking to the clinic administrator.

pharmacy.meds_desc: Track your daily pill schedule and request prescription refills easily.
pharmacy.compliance_desc: You've logged your daily medications 6 days in a row. Keep it up!
pharmacy.draft_saved: Prescription draft saved successfully to local records.
pharmacy.ledger_refreshed: The inventory ledger has been refreshed.
pharmacy.negative_hint: Use negative numbers to reduce stock.
pharmacy.intake_desc: Record new medicine shipments arriving at the facility.
pharmacy.adjustment_desc: Adjust existing stock levels due to loss, damage, or audit corrections.

admin.clinics_desc: Configure active health points, sub-clinics, and block hospital parameters.
admin.infra_desc: Register physical health posts, map block clinics, and manage local hardware signaling hubs.
admin.users_desc: Audit security roles, practitioner registrations, and administrative portal keys.
admin.user_mgmt_desc: Manage, authorize, and audit credential layers for clinicians, pharmacists, and health assistants.

asha.assisted_desc: Collect clinical patient vitals, register new rural digital health profiles, and coordinate teleconsultations.
asha.registration_desc: Register new offline profiles with E.164 phone linkage.
asha.vitals_desc: Measure blood pressure, temperature, and triage patient discomfort.
asha.reg_success: The patient has been added to the system.
asha.sync_desc: Sync assisted medical cases and rural registry details gathered during low-connectivity home visits.
asha.sync_info: All local vitals reports, registration records, and clinical observations are synced with the central regional server.
asha.no_phone_notice: Patient does not have a personal phone
